lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

High Side PWM outputs for backlight monitoring

lists.2: Main display - All segments ON (if LCD) or white for TFT
lists.3: Second display - All segments ON (if LCD) or white for TFT
lists.4: Main display - All pixels ON color 1 (red)
lists.5: Secondary display - All pixels ON color 1 (red)
lists.6: Main display - All pixels ON color 2 (green)
lists.7: Secondary display - All pixels ON color 2 (green)
lists.8: Main display - All pixels ON color 3 (blue)
lists.9: Secondary display - All pixels ON color 3 (blue)
lists.12: Main display - inverted chess pattern ON
lists.13: Secondary display - inverted chess pattern ON
lists.15: Secondary display - grey shades pattern ON

Display_Control.comment: This service is able to manage permanently the display(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Pointer_Control.comment: This service is able to manage permanently pointer(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Backlight_Control.comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Language_CF.comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

lists.1: Sensor is out of range (NewOilLevel.Status!= Invalid_Out_Of_Range)

lists.2: Circuit short to battery or open circuit
lists.3: Open circuit (sensor disconnected) (possible only if NivocodSensorType_CF = 1)

lists.5: Out of range (measured resistance doesn't match with defined resistance ranges)
